prediction_storage.notes: VoiceMOS scores are MOS-style naturalness/quality ratings. Preserve raw model outputs and parsed numeric scores before any calibration.

mos_1_5.prompt_template:
Rate the naturalness and overall quality of this synthesized speech on a 1-5 MOS scale.

Use this scale:
1 = very unnatural or very poor quality.
2 = poor quality.
3 = fair quality.
4 = good quality.
5 = completely natural or excellent quality.

Return only a single number from 1 to 5. Decimals are allowed.
mos_1_5.description: One model call per audio sample asking for a VoiceMOS-style 1-5 MOS naturalness/quality score.
